code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{fetchInventoryItems}from'../../services/inventoryService';import{InventoryContainer,InventoryTitle,InventoryTable,InventoryTableHeader,InventoryTableCell}from'./InventoryStyles';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const InventoryList=()=>{const[inventoryItems,setInventoryItems]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{const loadInventoryItems=async()=>{try{const items=await fetchInventoryItems();setInventoryItems(items);}catch(err){setError(String(err));}finally{setLoading(false);}};loadInventoryItems();},[]);if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Loading..."});}if(error){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:["Error: ",error]});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(InventoryContainer,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryTitle,{children:"Inventory List"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(InventoryTable,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryTableHeader,{children:"Item ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryTableHeader,{children:"Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryTableHeader,{children:"Quantity"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryTableHeader,{children:"Location"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryTableHeader,{children:"Price"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:inventoryItems.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryTableCell,{children:item.id}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryTableCell,{children:item.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryTableCell,{children:item.quantity}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryTableCell,{children:item.location}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(InventoryTableCell,{children:item.price})]},item.id))})]})]});};export default InventoryList;
